commit_subject: feat(T001): scaffold src package with Pydantic state models
commit_body: Create deviate package structure with DeviateConfig and SessionState Pydantic models, Typer CLI entry points, and comprehensive model validation tests covering defaults, extra field rejection, timeout constraints, phase validation, and JSON round-trips.

validation.summary: 10/10 tests passed, ruff lint clean, 0 warnings

reasoning.approach: Created all 7 files for T001 in a single pass: package scaffold, Pydantic models with field validators, Typer app entry, and isolated unit tests

key_decisions.decision: Used lambda: datetime.now(timezone.utc) instead of deprecated datetime.utcnow
key_decisions.rationale: Python 3.13 removes utcnow(); timezone-aware UTC is the modern pattern
YELLOW is conditional and JUDGE is a compliance gate, not standard phases per constitution
